# v2.0.6

## Changes

- Improved dashboard responsiveness when the browser window is narrowed.
- Metric cards now wrap by available width instead of forcing four cramped columns.
- Tables start horizontal scrolling earlier to avoid overflowing panels.
- Mobile-sized layouts use tighter metric cards and hide decorative sparklines.

## Assets

- Windows x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.6-windows-x86_64.zip`
- Ubuntu x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.6-linux-x86_64.tar.gz`
